title: Four new apps sprout in the showcase
summary:
A healthy crop of new community apps hits the showcase, plus a quick fix for Anthropic client compatibility.

The community directory gets heavier. We merged in Worl Tools (offline desktop utilities), App Forge, Pyanchor (a live-edit sidecar for Next.js/Vite), and ZenWall AI (minimalist vertical wallpapers). More tools, more pixels, more code.

If you were using Anthropic-shaped clients like Claude Code with strict OpenAI-compatible models, you might have hit a wall of 400 errors. We now strip the cache_control field from message content parts before forwarding the request. Problem solved.
